sentences.text: take a bite written by harriet rosenblum illustrated by chad libby focus question what lesson does mani learn in this story
mani hated all the food on his plate
take a bite his parents said
mani took one bite of chicken
take a bite his parents said
mani took one bite of peas
take a bite his parents said
mani took one bite of salad
the family had cake for dessert mani got one bite
